text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O receives tickets for the<n>amusement
park and invites me to<n>come.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark... Who among us should<n>rejoice? Yourself?
Or the attractions?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, the attractions! It should comeas a supreme delight that I, theOverlord, am present to enjoy them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Exuberant swans treading through<n>the waters
might take flight! Spinning<n>tea cups may quicken
into a cyclone<n>of sheer jubilation!
choice_data_list: You don't think that sounds dangerous?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, not to worry! I will manage<n>should it come to
that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tarry not. Why don't we begin with<n>the ride most
near?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We head into the building of the<n>nearest attraction,
but then...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hyeee! S-stop, please! This mustn't...<n>Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How terrific! And in every sense of<n>the word!
Trainer... save yourself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O falls to her knees. I rush<n>over and
help her out of the building.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...I apologize for losing my composure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Never had I imagined... that within<n>such an
enclosure there would be...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Mirrors upon cascading mirrors ad<n>infinitum!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So that is a "house of mirrors"... Myown brilliance nearly blinded me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And you, Trainer, to be surrounded by<n>such
multiplicities of myself... I must<n>apologize!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your eyes... Were they not damaged?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She seems genuinely concerned...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She seems genuinely concerned...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, what a relief!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though encircled by my beauty, you<n>would still
assist in my escape...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your utter desire to save me, made<n>manifest... You
are full of surprises.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But such a dire undertaking surely<n>produced dire
consequences. Do you<n>require rest?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. You are kind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, please, allow me to show my<n>appreciation, at
least for today. Why<n>not enjoy a peaceful ride on
the<n>Ferris wheel?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though it may be but a fleeting<n>moment, my
beauty shall be for your<n>eyes only!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! My exquisite profile, gazing<n>from the sky
upon the ground!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O strikes pose after pose, yet<n>the Ferris
wheel car doesn't wobble<n>an inch. Talk about
inner muscle<n>stability.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiastic presence is so<n>captivating I can't
help but ignore the<n>outside view our ride was
meant to<n>offer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, you bolted in with your eyes fixed<n>downward?
Yes, I think that was a<n>sound judgment.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An aptitude for split-second<n>decision-making is a
necessity for<n>trainers as well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... I must take a lesson from<n>your actions.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, I'm completely at fault for<n>this. How can
I earn your<n>forgiveness?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I will! For it will not do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Trainer, follow me—with<n>haste!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She takes off running, and I hurriedly<n>follow, until
I'm led to a boat floating<n>on the lake.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha! Now, let your eyes feast!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As I stand aboard this boat, yielding<n>to the waves'
gentle motion, what<n>results is an image too
beautiful for<n>even a painting to capture!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O continues striking pose after<n>pose as the
boat slowly drifts atop<n>the water.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The leisurely pace is contrasted with<n>a rushing
sense of speed... I'm not<n>really sure how to
describe it.
